---
title: "Mark Muetzelfeldt"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/markmuetz
---

I'm Mark Muetzelfeldt, a [researcher at the University of Reading](https://research.reading.ac.uk/meteorology/people/mark-muetzelfeldt/). This is my personal site with some thoughts on km-scale climate modelling, coding, LLMs, organized deep convection, and anything else that crosses my mind. Head over to my [Blog](blog.qmd) for posts.
